sizing_rule.note: Position size inversely scaled to ATR-based volatility over 14 periods. Formula: (2.0% equity) / (ATR as % of price). All positions maintain equivalent risk exposure regardless of price movement magnitude.

source_rule_text: Scale position size as a fixed percentage of equity inversely proportional to the volatility of the instrument, so that all positions carry equivalent risk exposure regardless of their underlying price movement magnitude.
